creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Hi,

yes I see the dependency line

 libjpeg is needed by libqpdf is needed by cups-filters


And yes - all of them are there

And yes - all of them are fresh re installed (except cups-filters)

yes - I did all that already.

So - why cups-filters is taking care for a "dependency-dependency"?
If qpdf is there - the make run of cups-filters should not complain
any stuff from qpdf's responsibilities. Should it?!


Question: Who did the decision between jpeg and jpeg-turbo on my system? was it
a default somewhere in the past?
